productDisplayName: Puma Men Heroes Graphic Green Tshirts
description: Composition Green round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand badge stitched on the left sleeve and graphic print on the front with flock detailing Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Looking hip becomes easy with this green Heroes t-shirt from puma. A smart graphic pattern of fabulous puma shoes on the front makes this T-shirt absolutely irresistible. Team it with jeans or shorts for that perfect look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulder-18"
